title: SACRAMENTO – Today, Speaker of the Assembly Anthony Rendon appointed Assemblymember Jacqui Irwin (Thousand Oaks – D) to serve on the Cradle-to-Career Data System Governing Board. E

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Cradle-to-Career Data System will link California’s existing education, workforce, financial aid, and social service information.",
    "The data system will help students and families more easily navigate the educational pipeline.",
    "The data system is intended to empower policymakers and educators to address disparities in opportunities.",
    "Reliability of data that spans across educational segments and institutions became especially critical due to the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "The data system is expected to identify high impact practices and target resources to close equity gaps.",
    "California lacks the ability to track individual student progress as they advance from one educational level to the next.",
    "The data system will provide access to aggregate and de-identified data through publicly facing dashboards."
  ]
}
```
